Iran's target selection prioritizing radar, C2 & intel at start of conflict is bearing fruit. Degraded radar, C2 & op control degrades AD & sortie rate.

I think coalition air fields will be subject to intense strikes going fwd, especially force multipliers, runway & hangars. https://t.co/l9H674GfDL

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:

Iran got plugged into that + whatever its own network uncovered. https://t.co/5k5XGDw8iR

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
China seems to be embracing OpenClaw faster than anywhere else.

Meituan is teaming up w/ Lenovo to deploy hardware for supporting OpenClaw service. Chargin 395-695 for installation.

Tencent continues to add OpenClaw support w/ QQ chatbot, each can support 5 accounts.

It is https://t.co/3vFF0wRtf0

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
If I understand this correctly, then IDF revealed its latest wave against Iran involved 80 aircraft & 230 munitions.

That seems significantly reduced vs 200+ earlier.

Very hard to sustain max operational tempo for long period when you are facing drone/missile attacks + other https://t.co/TtToaQIwrA

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Helium production by country & for China. Note US dominance in production followed by Qatar, Algeria & Russia.

China sourced 47% of He from Qatar in 2025, just behind the 50% from Russia.

The current situation maybe a catalyst for China to greatly increase domestic supply. https://t.co/TNLfmvBrVx https://t.co/RdyL3TrNE9

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD Blade 2.0 is far ahead in tech. It likely uses 4th gen LFP cathode w/ 2.6 density & Graphite + CNT anode & ultra thin separator.

Cold weather tech uses direct heating plate & HF pulse self-heating tech to ensure uniformity of cell heating to allow for fast charging in cold. https://t.co/6EoWxCQGIh

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
It is likely that China will source both domestically & more from US/Russia/Algeria this yr + consume stockpile. But it is also possible that by 2028, China won't need to import He from Qatar anymore.

Such is the importance of domestic supply of specialty gases.

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Reminder that China alone imported ~3000t of Tungsten concentrate/craps in 2025/12. Which is still just a fraction of the 67000t it mined in 2024.

So no, 2400t more in demand in a yr is not that big. America imported 11819t in 2025 & it imported ~15000t as recently as 2018. https://t.co/gmHcHk1Gb8 https://t.co/W4MuaObc7e

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Back in Aug, China achieved production of 6N9 grade He  from NG capable of 400k m3/machine/yr. If China loses Qatar supply for 6 months, it will need to make up 6.25m m3 somewhere & that can be produced from just 8 machines for FY or 16 for half yr.
https://t.co/tX2176T30S

Colombia auto sales for February.

BYD sold 1138 vehicles, 7th & 4.5% share, up 136% YoY

tweets.author: jukan05
tweets.text:
Some people are spreading fear by claiming that OpenAI and Oracle have halted their data center expansion, but in reality, this simply means OpenAI has decided that, at this point, it makes more sense to scale up Vera Rubin clusters rather than Blackwell clusters.

It does not https://t.co/VgIRdMiHmQ

Panasonic has announced a final order deadline of March 31, 2026 for certain CCL products that use E-glass fabric from Panasonic, Nittobo, Asahi Kasei, and Asahi-Schweibel Taiwan (AST), as these suppliers are discontinuing production, making stable supply no longer feasible.
